category_sources: Official GitHub README describes iconsur as a command-line tool for generating macOS Big Sur styled adaptive icons.
source_facts.description says it is a macOS Big Sur adaptive icon generator.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses `IconSur: macOS Big Sur Adaptive Icon Generator`.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents command-line usage for app icon generation.
source_facts.description identifies macOS Big Sur adaptive icon generation.
